case_title: NASIR PATEL VS. AARON HUTSON et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT HUTSON, AARON JACOBS, KIYOMI
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT HUTSON, AARON JACOBS, KIYOMI SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUTSON, AARON JACOBS, KIYOMI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PARK HOTEL 1040 FOLSOM ST.
